caption:
Follow for more Japanese 🇯🇵 brands! 

#japan #travel #fashion
transcript: This is one of the best clothing stores in Japan that you have to check out. If you want to achieve that minimal, effortless Japanese style, then this is the perfect brand for you. I'm not exaggerating when I say that this brand has something for everyone. And it has become one of the largest fashion brands in Japan, creating multiple sub-labels, each of them catering to a different audience. They're also constantly collaborating with a large range of brands, creating some very unique, exclusive items. And being perfectly honest, this brand has me on my knees every time I visit. But my favorite part about this brand is that although they've expanded rapidly, their quality and attention to detail remains extremely high. You've probably heard of this brand before, but if not, they're called United Arrows. Let me know what you guys think and like and follow for more fashion content.
